column1: # License: free academic; cite Bell 2016 (OEF Research).
# This file is the single source of truth for which REIGN columns are
# read in Stage 2. Every Stage 2 REIGN adapter call resolves its
# `raw_column` list from this file. Adding/removing an indicator here is
# the only change needed to widen or narrow the REIGN ingestion.
# 1950 to 2021-08. The Stage 2 adapter writes one source_observations
# The catalog below narrows the 41 columns to the 8 most-useful
# identity / governance columns. The Stage 2 adapter writes one
# and `ccode` (numeric COW). The Stage 2 source_row_reference uses
# the country display name URL-safe-substituted so the audit trail
# is locatable. Stage 3 (country match) resolves display name to
# keyed by the row's `year` column (int). The `month` column is
# so the audit trail identifies the specific month.
# REIGN uses pandas NaN for missing numeric values and empty string
# for missing text values. The Stage 2 reader treats both as missing;
# the source_observations row is SKIPPED for that variable.
# `male` is 1 (male) or 0 (female). The Stage 2 reader preserves the
# raw 0/1 value in raw_value and normalizes to 1/2 (1=M
# All REIGN numeric columns are float64 in the raw CSV. The Stage 2
# reader preserves the float in raw_value and converts to a clean
